name: io.github.slavins-co/cellartracker-mcp
title: CellarTracker
description: Read-only access to your CellarTracker wine cellar: inventory, drinking windows, purchases, notes.

environmentVariables.name: CT_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: CellarTracker username. Optional at install: the setup-credentials tool can store login locally instead.

environmentVariables.name: CT_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: CellarTracker password. Optional at install: the setup-credentials tool can store login locally instead.
